items.name: Mask
items.description:
⭐join groupfor more :
https://www.roblox.com/communities/34766380/2312#!/about





Step into the spotlight and transform your avatar with the Royal Jester Mask – a perfect blend of mystery, fun, and style!

Featuring a vibrant design with bold red, green, and blue accents, this mask combines the playful spirit of a jester with the elegance of a royal crown. The tall pointed crown and golden tips add a

Whether you’re roleplaying in a medieval kingdom, attending a masquerade ball, or just looking to bring some festive vibes to your Roblox adventures, this mask is the ultimate accessory. It fits perfectly with fantasy outfits, carnival costumes, and even modern streetwear for those who like mixing styles

items.name: Locust Shoulder Pet
items.description:
Bring a sinister little companion to your avatar with the Locust Shoulder Pet, inspired by ancient swarm legends and eerie insect spirits whispered about in forgotten ruins.

Whether you’re building a dark sorcerer look, cursed wanderer outfit, post-apocalypse survivor, or creepy-cute collector style, this detailed shoulder companion adds a mysterious presence that people notice instantly.

⚡ Why this shoulder pet stands out:
✅ High-detail 3D locust with realistic texture
✅ Fits naturally on your shoulder with most outfits
✅Perfect for cursed, dark fantasy, swarm, or anime-inspired avatar styles
✅ Show love to the Locust crew & creator

Some say it follows powerful hosts… others say it chooses them.
Add your swarm companion today before it disappears into the wind.

tags:
locust guy pet, swarm villain pet, anime locust pet, curse bug roblox, insect curse pet, dark swarm pet, locust shoulder pet, locust pet roblox,, jujutsu, swarm pet, jujutsu keisen, locust guy
